proposed_catalog_row.Paper: De Paoli and Paustian (2017), Coordinating monetary and macroprudential policies
proposed_catalog_row.KeyFeatures: Rotemberg sticky prices; Gertler-Karadi-style bank moral hazard; working-capital cost channel; macroprudential funding subsidy; optimal policy games

proposed_status_row.formula_quality: OCR mostly usable but equation (24) tag and several definition fragments need source-level review
proposed_status_row.steady_state_quality: linear model steady state documented as zero deviations; calibration discrepancy noted
proposed_status_row.notes: No Dynare run; .mod used only as implementation_cross_check; shared catalog/status not edited.

unresolved_issues: Equation (24) OCR tag spacing and several math/prose fragments need PDF-level formula review.
